title: Totem TP
description: rename a totem with cords and a dimension  and when you use it it will teliport you there
body:
this mod is made for excaping by just poping a totem to use this mod correctly you must rename the totem in an anvil and rename it TTP (cords) (dimetion) (Example:TTP 0 64 0 overworld) use casses for this is pvp think about this your in pvp you runing low on resources you pop your last totem then you get teloported to your base this could save you your aromor and you life!
soon i will try to expand this to other modloaders and plugins!(some versions may be missing commands such as /ttp slient /ttp immortal ect.)
